summary: Completed testing of CPC and Demand module enhancements. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - all new features working correctly including forecast table new columns, CPC Plan dialog with branch selector and capacity validation, and View Lots dialog with Add to Existing Lot and Create New Lot options.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed missing getHeaders() function in Demand.js - was causing errors when using Add to Lot or Create New Lot features
seed_data_creation: Created new dispatch lot with 10 units during UI testing via Create New Lot feature
context_for_next_testing_agent: CPC and Demand module enhancements fully tested. All new endpoints working: GET /api/forecasts returns dispatch_allocated, production_scheduled, schedule_pending columns; GET /api/skus/{sku_id}/assigned-branches returns branches for SKU; GET /api/branches/{branch}/capacity-for-date returns capacity info; POST /api/cpc/schedule-from-forecast accepts branch parameter with capacity validation; POST /api/dispatch-lots/{lot_id}/add-line adds line to existing lot; GET /api/dispatch-lots/by-buyer/{buyer_id} returns buyer's lots; POST /api/branches/model-capacity/upload uploads model-specific capacity. Frontend: Demand page shows new columns (Forecast Qty, Dispatch Alloc, Prod Scheduled, Sched Pending), View Lots dialog has Add to Existing Lot and Create New Lot options. CPC Plan dialog has Branch selector with capacity info display.

frontend_ui.demand_page_dispatch_alloc_column: PASS - Column visible in table header
frontend_ui.demand_page_prod_scheduled_column: PASS - Column visible in table header

frontend_ui.cpc_page_plan_dialog_branch_selector: PASS - Shows available branches for SKU
frontend_ui.cpc_page_plan_dialog_capacity_info: PASS - Shows capacity when branch and date selected

bug_fixed.issue: Missing getHeaders() function causing errors in Add to Lot and Create New Lot features
bug_fixed.fix: Added getHeaders() helper function that returns auth headers from token
